leadText: Sniper (Japanese: スナイパー Sniper) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation IV 1.1.2 Generation V 1.1.3 Generation VI onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Sniper increases critical-hit damage by 50%. Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] Critical hits will do 3× damage instead of 2× damage. Sniper cannot be activated by Beat Up . Generation V [ edit | edit source ] Sniper can now be activated by Beat Up. Additionally, rather than changing the critical hit multiplier directly, Sniper now multiplies by 1.5 the damage dealt by a move that deals a critical hit, applied last to damage as part of the "final" modifiers that get applied to the damage, resulting in virtually the same effect. Generation VI onward [ edit | edit source ] Critical hits will now effectively do only 2.25× damage, as a result of the critical hit multiplier being lowered to 1.5×. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Sniper has no effect outside of battle.

Generation V [ edit | edit source ] Sniper can now be activated by Beat Up. Additionally, rather than changing the critical hit multiplier directly, Sniper now multiplies by 1.5 the damage dealt by a move that deals a critical hit, applied last to damage as part of the "final" modifiers that get applied to the damage, resulting in virtually the same effect. Generation VI onward [ edit | edit source ] Critical hits will now effectively do only 2.25× damage, as a result of the critical hit multiplier being lowered to 1.5×.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Boosts the damage the Pokémon inflicts with critical hits. B S L きゅうしょに こうげきを あてたときの ダメージが おおきくなる Conq. Powers up moves if they become critical hits. MD GtI Unavailable S MD Damage when an attack results in a critical hit goes up! MD RT DX This Ability increases the damage of moves that result in critical hits.
